name: Radiation House
original_name: ラジエーションハウス～放射線科の診断レポート～
overview: Iori Igarashi is a talented radiographer who believes the “truth” is definitely captured in CT and MRI images. He and radiologist An Amakasu work at a hospital’s radiology department where they determine the causes of patients’ illnesses and injuries.

trailers.title: Radiation House - English Teaser 【Fuji TV Official】
